senses.gloss: more, an extra amount or extent

examples.text: يَوْمَ نَقُولُ لِجَهَنَّمَ هَلِ ٱمْتَلَأْتِ وَتَقُولُ هَلْ مِن مَزِيدٍ
examples.english: On the Day We will say to Hell, "Have you been filled?" and it will say, "Are there some more?"

examples.text: لَهُمْ مَا يَشَاءُونَ فِيهَا وَلَدَيْنَا مَزِيدٌ
examples.english: They will have whatever they wish therein, and with Us is more.
